title: Monthly Results (verified scoreboard template)
_note: DRAFT v2 (#MonthlyResults). Bare WIN/LOSS counts only, NEVER a fixed win-rate %. Fill every [..] from public log on month-end, then ready=true. Never invent numbers.
body:
📊 #MonthlyResults — [Month]

Signals posted: [N]
Type के हिसाब से:
• Scalp → WINS [w] / LOSSES [l]
• Swing → WINS [w] / LOSSES [l]
• [type] → WINS [w] / LOSSES [l]

Best: LC-[####] [+R]R   ·   Worst: LC-[####] [−R]R

कुल मिलाकर: [honest qualitative line — कोई fixed win-rate % नहीं]

ऊपर का हर trade exchange screenshots के साथ हमारे public log में है। खुद चेक करें।

#MonthlyResults
